title: Monorepo skeleton & tooling
description: Create the §27 directory layout with per-service docs, root README, Makefile, .gitignore, .env.example.

title: Event schemas + codegen (schemas package)
description: Author JSON Schemas for InboundMessage, AgentEvent, AgentTask, ScheduledJob; wire TS + Pydantic codegen.
acceptance: TS types + Pydantic models generated in CI

title: Shared error taxonomy (errors package)
description: Encode the §21 error taxonomy once, exported to TS + Py, used by the unified error envelope.

title: DB migrations + migration tooling
description: Ship 0001_init + 0002_automations and adopt Atlas (expand/contract, destructive-in-release = STOP).
acceptance: Migrations apply on clean Postgres (17 tables, pgvector, HNSW, partitioned audit)

title: Dev docker-compose stack
description: Compose for postgres(pgvector)/redis/nats/vault/trigger.dev with healthchecks; apps behind a profile.
acceptance: `docker compose up` boots data tier healthy

title: auth-service (OIDC, JWT, JWKS)
description: OIDC login (Entra ID / Slack), signed session JWT (15 min), JWKS endpoint, key rotation.

title: Shared runtime libs (bus, OTel, JWT, idempotency)
description: shared-ts + shared-py: NATS client, OpenTelemetry setup, JWT verify, idempotency helpers.

title: CI pipeline skeleton
description: GitHub Actions: lint/typecheck (ruff/mypy, eslint/tsc, golangci-lint), unit tests, contract tests.

title: End-to-end JWT smoke (exit criterion)
description: Prove identity flows adapter → signed JWT → a protected backend route end-to-end.
acceptance: JWT minted and validated across a request

title: NATS JetStream provisioning
description: Declare streams/subjects: inbound.messages, agent.events.*, orchestrator.commands, automation.lifecycle.

title: backend-core REST+WS API
description: FastAPI conversations/messages/stream/approve/cancel/me with idempotency and §8.3 replay protocol.

title: backend-core ↔ NATS + Postgres
description: Replace in-memory store with asyncpg; publish inbound to bus and bridge AgentEvents back to WS.

title: prompt-layer (minimal)
description: Stateless service: classify chat_simple vs task_agentique, pass-through routing, emit signed AgentTask.

title: orchestrator sandbox lifecycle (Go)
description: Go service: sandbox state machine (create/warm/active/hibernate/kill), gRPC API, turn dispatch.

title: Hardened sandbox image
description: OpenCode Docker image: rootless, gVisor RuntimeClass, no egress except MCP Gateway + llm-proxy.

title: OpenCode agent + profiles
description: Run OpenCode in server mode inside the sandbox; load dev/data/ops/generalist profiles; MCP client.

title: MCP Gateway core
description: Single AuthZ/secret-injection/DLP/audit point: verify TASK JWT, tool routing, audit each call.

title: GitHub MCP server
description: Code search/read, branches, commits, PRs, issues, merge (approval-gated).

title: Web app chat (streaming)
description: React chat mapping AgentEvent → UI (deltas, tool lines, approval cards, done/cost); WS token streaming.

title: llm-proxy (minimal)
description: LiteLLM config with a single frontier + eco model, budget headers, request logging.

title: Persistent workspace volume
description: Per-user /workspace volume with .agent/ notes; survives sandbox kill/restart.

title: P1 demo: GitHub task from web (exit criterion)
description: End-to-end: web message → sandbox → GitHub MCP task with live streaming.

title: Teams adapter
description: Bot Framework SDK v4: normalize activities → InboundMessage, SSO token exchange, Adaptive Cards, proactive.

title: Teams webhook JWT validation
description: Validate Bot Framework JWT on every activity (aud/iss, 5-min clock skew), fail-closed.

title: Slack adapter
description: Bolt app: <3s ACK + 👀 reaction, InboundMessage publish, Block Kit cards, slash commands.

title: Slack signature verify + retry dedup
description: HMAC signature check (5-min anti-replay) and dedup of Slack retries via event_id in Redis.

title: Simple vs complex routing
description: Fast classification path: chat_simple (no sandbox, eco LLM) vs task_agentique with milestones.

title: Mid-turn escalation
description: chat_simple → task_agentique escalation emitting agent.escalated and waking the sandbox.

title: Account linking for unknown users
description: Unlinked mention → ephemeral OIDC linking prompt; no processing before linkage.

title: Proactive notifications
description: Store conversationReference (Teams) / channel refs; deliver async/long-task and scheduled results.

title: P2 exit: same task from Teams & Slack
description: Run the P1 task identically from Teams and Slack.

title: Permissions engine (RBAC+ABAC)
description: tool_policies matrix (org,role,tool_pattern)→allow/deny/require_approval; compute allowed_tools per turn.

title: Human approval flow (HITL)
description: require_approval suspends the tool call, emits approval.needed, resolves via approve endpoint/card.
acceptance: pending stored in Redis with timeout

title: Designated approvers (team mode)
description: approver_group routing: card goes to the group, not the requester; both parties logged.

title: Input guardrails
description: Prompt-injection classifier + attachment heuristics, PII scope filter, org content policy; fail-closed.

title: Output guardrails / DLP
description: Scan responses + generated files for secrets (regex + gitleaks lib); mask/refuse on policy violation.

title: Vault + encrypted OAuth token store
description: Vault integration; oauth_tokens encrypted AES-256-GCM with Vault key; injection only at gateway.

title: OAuth connect flows + refresh sweep
description: GitHub/Notion OAuth start/callback; Trigger.dev oauth-refresh-sweep job with Redis locks.

title: Audit log (append-only, partitioned)
description: Write audit rows for every tool call/cron/admin action; monthly partitions; WORM export to S3.

title: Admin console v1
description: Backoffice: orgs, users, tool_policies editor, budgets, audit viewer; SSO+MFA, view-as (read-only).

title: P3 exit: approvals + audit demonstrated
description: Show a require_approval decision and export the audit trail.

title: Working memory (Redis)
description: 30-turn window + rolling summary (TTL 7d, re-summary every 15 turns).

title: Semantic memory (pgvector) + extraction
description: Durable facts in pgvector with dedup (cosine>0.92); async memory-extraction job.

title: Memory MCP (save/search/update/forget)
description: Audited memory tool behind the gateway; versioned update; user self-serve forget.

title: Procedural notes in workspace
description: NOTES.md + per-project notes as the learned how-to; injected as <procedural_notes>.

title: Corrections memory
description: Capture explicit corrections/thumbs-down/repeated approval refusals with reinforced weight.

title: Hybrid retrieval ranking
description: top-k=8 hybrid score (cosine+recency+frequency, correction bonus), threshold 0.55, expires_at purge.

title: Planning (plan decomposition)
description: Decompose task_agentique into a 3-7 step plan; detect automation intent; drive progress UI.

title: Multi-model routing + fallback
description: llm-proxy routes eco/frontier by role, org-configurable, auto-fallback on quota/incident.

title: Budgets + kill-switch
description: Per-turn/per-run/per-month/per-org budgets with enforcement and an org kill-switch.

title: Prompt-cache context structure
description: Structure the LLM context for prompt caching; report cache hit rate.

title: Agent profile selection
description: Select OpenCode profile by classification + user preference (dev/data/ops/generalist).

title: Memory UI + hygiene guards
description: Memories page (view/edit/delete by type) + write-forbidden guards (secrets, sensitive, third-party facts).

title: P4 exit: personalization + cost tracking
description: Show personalization influencing answers and per-org cost tracking.

title: automation-service jobs API
description: TypeScript service owning scheduled_jobs: create/update/pause/resume/delete/resync.

title: Trigger.dev self-hosted
description: Deploy Trigger.dev v4 (webapp/supervisor/workers/datastores); DEV/STAGING/PROD envs isolated.

title: Pivot task (agent-scheduled-run)
description: The one durable task that fires a cron and re-injects an InboundMessage into /internal/scheduled-runs.

title: Scheduler MCP façade
description: MCP tools create_cron/list_crons/pause/run_now over automation-service; policy-gated.

title: Cron creation flow + approval
description: NL intent → proposed cron → user confirmation → active; immutable versioned prompt.

title: Fire-time permissions preflight
description: Re-evaluate perms/guardrails/budgets at each run; degrade/pause on revocation (E_PERM_REVOKED).

title: Job lifecycle state machine
description: draft/pending_approval/active/paused/deleted with 3-failure auto-pause and resume re-checks.

title: Delivery & notifications
description: Deliver run results to DM/email/webhook; anti-noise digests; no-op suppression.

title: job_memory between runs
description: Persist per-job state (dedup already-alerted, no_op markers) in scheduled_jobs.job_memory.

title: Automations UI page
description: User page: list crons (human schedule, next run, run history+cost), pause/resume/edit/delete.

title: Internal platform jobs
description: Migrate consolidation jobs to Trigger.dev: memory-consolidation, oauth-refresh-sweep, partition roll, user-erasure.

title: Event-driven automations (webhooks)
description: Inbound webhooks trigger automations (Sentry/GitHub events) into the same pipeline.

title: P5 exit: fire-time perms proven
description: Demo §18.2 + §18.3 end-to-end; revoke a right and show the job pauses.

title: M365 MCP (Graph delegated)
description: Outlook/Teams/Calendar/SharePoint via MS Graph, delegated (OBO); read/search/summarize/send (approval).

title: Browser MCP (hardened Playwright pool)
description: Headless Playwright pool: read/click/fill/download/capture; sandboxed, resource-capped.

title: Database MCP (capped SELECT)
description: Schema introspection + capped read-only SELECTs + internal APIs; write behind deny/approval.

title: Notion MCP
description: Create/read minutes, specs, wikis in Notion.

title: Slack MCP
description: Read channels and post recaps (distinct from the inbound Slack adapter).

title: Connector onboarding process
description: Industrialized checklist/template to add a connector (scopes, policies, tests, docs).

title: P6 exit: 7 connectors in internal prod
description: GitHub+M365+Browser+DB+Notion+Slack+Scheduler live internally.

title: K8s topology + gVisor
description: Namespaces per §22.1, dedicated tainted sandbox node pool, gVisor RuntimeClass.

title: Sandbox NetworkPolicy lockdown
description: Egress only to mcp-gateway:8443 + llm-proxy:4000 + kube-dns; ingress only from orchestrator.

title: Terraform IaC
description: VPC, cluster, KMS, S3, DNS as code.

title: Helm charts per service
description: Chart per service + values per env; Trigger.dev official chart wired.

title: ArgoCD GitOps
description: App-of-apps; auto-sync staging, manual-approval prod, canary 10% on backend-core.

title: Full CI/CD (evals gate, supply chain)
description: Extend CI: evals gate, image build+SBOM(syft)+cosign, Trivy(CRITICAL=STOP), Atlas migration lint.

title: Observability stack
description: OTel traces + Prometheus + Grafana + Loki + Tempo; dashboards per service.

title: SLO dashboards + bi-level alerting
description: SLOs (Annexe A): first-token P95, cron failure rate, cron delay, error-budget burn; multi-window multi-burn alerts.

title: Agent evals (golden + adversarial)
description: 150 golden tasks + 20 cron scenarios + injection corpus; run as CI gate.

title: Warm pool + hibernation
description: Warm sandbox pool + aggressive hibernation to hit the cost model.

title: HA topology
description: Postgres primary+replicas failover, NATS 3-node cluster, orchestrator leader election, multi-AZ.

title: DR: backups + resync
description: WAL archiving+snapshots+Trigger.dev dumps (RPO 15m/RTO 1h); resync-schedules script.

title: Load tests
description: 500 active sandboxes + 1000 crons/h; verify autoscaling and jitter smoothing.

title: Pentest + incident response
description: External pentest; breach/incident-response runbook; remediation tracked.

title: Admin console complete + platctl + runbooks
description: Full console, platctl CLI, runbooks; solo-ops rituals.

title: org-platform dogfooding
description: Run the platform team on its own org (§24.8) as living QA.

title: P7 exit: SLOs met, 99.9%
description: All SLOs (Annexe A) sustained; availability target proven.

title: Localization fr/en/ar
description: Localize agent replies, approval cards, notifications, error taxonomy; RTL for Arabic.

title: Pricing & packaging
description: Define plans/seats/quotas, TND billing with local VAT, usage split interactive vs scheduled.

title: Legal: ToS, DPA, liability
description: Terms, data processing agreement, liability model, sub-processor list.

title: Support & SLA
description: Contractual support tiers and SLAs; escalation paths.

title: Org onboarding flow
description: Self-serve/assisted org onboarding: identity linking, connectors, policies, budgets.
acceptance: Org can be onboarded in a day

title: RGPD user-erasure
description: Erasure job purging memories/entities/entity_facts/workspace notes; UI trigger.

title: At-rest volume encryption
description: Encrypt sandbox volumes at rest.

title: Attachment antivirus
description: Scan inbound attachments before storage/use.

title: Breach response plan
description: Documented breach detection→containment→notification with regulatory timelines.

title: Prompt registry + feedback→evals loop
description: Registry of system prompts + a feedback loop feeding the eval corpus.

title: Team mode (Mode B) configuration
description: Shared org-agent: GitHub App token, service DB, on_behalf_of authz, org memory, no personal connectors.
